_comment: LoRA fine-tuning job config — PLACEHOLDER. No training runner exists yet.
_phase: Phase 3 (future). Do not use until training infrastructure is built.

job.name: theorc-boss-gemma4-lora-v1
job.description: LoRA adapter for gemma4:12b boss planning role

base_model._note: When gemma4:12b-it-qat lands on Ollama, prefer that as base for better quality-per-bit.

adapter._rank_note: r=16 is a good starting point. Increase to 32-64 if planning quality plateaus.
adapter._alpha_note: alpha = 2*rank is a common default. Effective LR scale = alpha/rank = 2.0.
adapter._target_modules_note: All attention and MLP projection layers. Gemma4 uses GatedMLP (gate+up+down). If quality is insufficient, add 'embed_tokens' and 'lm_head'.

training._framework_note: Unsloth is preferred for Gemma4 — it has a native Gemma4 fast kernel and the QAT GGUF export path. Fallback: HuggingFace PEFT + trl.
training._max_seq_note: Boss planning examples are ~600-1200 tokens (system+goal+plan). 2048 covers all cases with headroom.

dataset._format_note: Each example is {messages:[{role:system,...},{role:user,...},{role:assistant,...}]}. The assistant turn is the JSON plan.
dataset._system_prompt_note: Use the same system prompt TheOrc sends at runtime. Sync with SwarmSession.BossDecomposeSystemPrompt.

hyperparams._lr_note: Standard LoRA LR. Reduce to 1e-4 if loss oscillates.
hyperparams._epochs_note: 3 epochs on ~300 examples. Watch for overfitting on eval loss.
hyperparams._optimizer_note: 8-bit AdamW via bitsandbytes reduces optimizer memory by ~60%.

output._deploy_note: After GGUF export: ollama create theorc-boss:gemma4-ft -f fine_tuning/theorc-boss-gemma4-ft.Modelfile
